updatedContent

originalContent
updatedContent

updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bgnuppud" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/daark_green" app:strokeWidth="2dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/selectedPlantImage" android:layout_width="70dp" android:layout_height="70dp" android:background="@color/tekstEnts" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/nickname" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Nickname" android:textColor="@color/daark_green" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/common_name" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Common Name" android:textColor="@color/daark_green" android:textSize="14sp" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/scientific_name" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Scientific Name" android:textColor="@color/daark_green" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="italic" /> </LinearLayout>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/drop" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_drop" app:tint="@color/daark_green" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/edit" android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_edit" app:tint="@color/daark_green" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/delete" android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_delete" app:tint="@color/daark_green" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bgnuppud" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/daark_green" app:strokeWidth="2dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/selectedPlantImage" android:layout_width="70dp" android:layout_height="70dp" android:background="@color/tekstEnts" android:contentDescription="@string/selected_plant_image" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/nickname" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/nickname_label" android:textColor="@color/daark_green" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/common_name" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/common_name_label" android:textColor="@color/daark_green" android:textSize="14sp" android:visibility="visible" /> </LinearLayout>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/drop" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:contentDescription="@string/water_indicator" android:src="@drawable/ic_drop" app:tint="@color/daark_green" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/edit" android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:contentDescription="@string/edit_plant" android:src="@drawable/ic_edit" app:tint="@color/daark_green" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/delete" android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:contentDescription="@string/delete_plant" android:src="@drawable/ic_delete" app:tint="@color/daark_green" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Plantastic</string>
<string name="welcome_to_"> Welcome \n to \nPlantastic! </string> <string name="go">Go!</string> <string name="add_a_plant">Add a plant</string> <string name="encyclopedia_title">encyclopedia</string> <string name="plant_name">plant name</string> <string name="settings_page">Settings page</string> <string name="seaded">Seaded</string> <string name="tere">Tere!</string> <string name="lemmikud">Lemmikud</string> <string name="selected_plant_image">Selected plant image</string> <string name="add_photo">Add photo</string> <string name="nickname_label">Nimi:</string> <string name="enter_nickname">Enter plant nickname</string> <string name="type_label">Tüüp:</string> <string name="enter_species">Enter plant species</string> <string name="description_label">Kirjeldus (Valik.):</string> <string name="enter_description">Enter description (optional)</string> <string name="cancel">Tühista</string> <string name="save">Salvesta</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Plantastic</string>
<string name="welcome_to_"> Welcome \n to \nPlantastic! </string> <string name="go">Go!</string> <string name="add_a_plant">Add a plant</string> <string name="encyclopedia_title">encyclopedia</string> <string name="plant_name">plant name</string> <string name="settings_page">Settings page</string> <string name="seaded">Seaded</string> <string name="tere">Tere!</string> <string name="lemmikud">Lemmikud</string> <string name="selected_plant_image">Selected plant image</string> <string name="add_photo">Add photo</string> <string name="nickname_label">Nimi:</string> <string name="enter_nickname">Enter plant nickname</string> <string name="common_name_label">Common name</string> <string name="edit_plant">Edit plant</string> <string name="delete_plant">Delete plant</string> <string name="water_indicator">Water indicator</string> <string name="type_label">Tüüp:</string> <string name="enter_species">Enter plant species</string> <string name="description_label">Kirjeldus (Valik.):</string> <string name="enter_description">Enter description (optional)</string> <string name="cancel">Tühista</string> <string name="save">Salvesta</string> </resources>
